tables.name: Table 1
tables.description: Overall survival (OS) and number of deaths by patient subgroup, including median OS, HR, and p-values for ADT plus docetaxel vs. ADT alone.

tables.description: Time to clinical progression by patient subgroup, including median time, HR, and p-values for ADT plus docetaxel vs. ADT alone.
